lines.english: What is the writer's carpet made of?
lines.chinese: 作者的地毯是用什么做的？
lines.raw: What is the writer's carpet made of? | 作者的地毯是用什么做的？

lines.english: We have just moved into a new house and I have been working hard all morning.
lines.chinese: 我们刚搬进一所新房子，我一上午都在忙碌着。
lines.raw: We have just moved into a new house and I have been working hard all morning. | 我们刚搬进一所新房子，我一上午都在忙碌着。

lines.english: I have been trying to get my new room in order.
lines.chinese: 我一直想把我的新房间整理好。
lines.raw: I have been trying to get my new room in order. | 我一直想把我的新房间整理好。

lines.english: This has not been easy because I own over a thousand books.
lines.chinese: 这可不容易，因为我拥有一千多本书。
lines.raw: This has not been easy because I own over a thousand books. | 这可不容易，因为我拥有一千多本书。
To make matters worse, | 更糟糕的是，
the room is rather small, | 房间相当小，

lines.english: so I have temporarily put my books on the floor.
lines.chinese: 所以我只好暂时把书放在地板上。
lines.raw: so I have temporarily put my books on the floor. | 所以我只好暂时把书放在地板上。

lines.english: At the moment, they cover every inch of floor space
lines.chinese: 这会儿，它们覆盖了地板上的每一寸地方，
lines.raw: At the moment, they cover every inch of floor space | 这会儿，它们覆盖了地板上的每一寸地方，

lines.english: and I actually have to walk on them to get in or out of the room.
lines.chinese: 我实际上得踩着它们才能进出房间。
lines.raw: and I actually have to walk on them to get in or out of the room. | 我实际上得踩着它们才能进出房间。

lines.english: A short while ago, my sister helped me to carry one of my old bookcases up the stairs.
lines.chinese: 不久前，我妹妹帮我把一个旧书柜搬上了楼。
lines.raw: A short while ago, my sister helped me to carry one of my old bookcases up the stairs. | 不久前，我妹妹帮我把一个旧书柜搬上了楼。

lines.english: She went into my room and got a big surprise when she saw all those books on the floor.
lines.chinese: 她走进我的房间，当她看到地板上所有的书时，大吃一惊。
lines.raw: She went into my room and got a big surprise when she saw all those books on the floor. | 她走进我的房间，当她看到地板上所有的书时，大吃一惊。

lines.english: 'This is the prettiest carpet I have ever seen,' she said.
lines.chinese: “这是我见过的最漂亮的地毯了，”她说。
lines.raw: 'This is the prettiest carpet I have ever seen,' she said. | “这是我见过的最漂亮的地毯了，”她说。

lines.english: She gazed at it for some time then added,
lines.chinese: 她凝视了一会儿，然后补充说，
lines.raw: She gazed at it for some time then added, | 她凝视了一会儿，然后补充说，
'You don't need bookcases at all. | “你根本不需要书柜。

lines.english: You can sit here in your spare time and read the carpet!'
lines.chinese: 你可以在业余时间坐在这里，读读这地毯！”
lines.raw: You can sit here in your spare time and read the carpet!' | 你可以在业余时间坐在这里，读读这地毯！”
